title: Teladoc Banks on BetterHelp's Insurance Expansion to Revive Segment Growth
text: Teladoc Banks on BetterHelp's Insurance Expansion to Revive Segment Growth. Teladoc is betting on insurance expansion to save BetterHelp segment. Key Strategy: Teladoc is building on its consumer position by adding insurance capabilities to grow and expand market opportunity. The company acquired UpLift for $45 million ($30 million cash and $15 million performance-contingent earnout) to phase in insurance access for BetterHelp customers. Insurance Rollout Progress: Expected to be largely national by end of next year. Insurance coverage launched in seven states and Washington, D.C. Insurance expansion generated $4M in Q3 and $12M-$14M expected for 2025. Future Outlook: Company projects BetterHelp to exceed $125 million annualized revenue run rate from insurance-based services by end of 2026. Continued rollout and scaling of insurance, plus non-U.S. market growth, are essential to BetterHelp's future given continued pressure on U.S. cash pay business. BetterHelp Q2 revenue $240.4 million (down 9% from Q2 2024), marking another quarter of losses for the segment.
